headline: 2 Reasons to Like PTC and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: What a brutal six months it’s been for PTC. The stock has dropped 21.4% and now trades at $162.75, rattling many shareholders. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Fernbridge Doubles Down on Tetra Tech Stock, Adds 2.05 Million Shares, According to Latest SEC Filing
summary: Tetra Tech delivers consulting and engineering services to government and commercial clients in water, energy, and infrastructure.
